MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS PACIFIC POLK PROPERTIES, LLC and CALIFORNIA-NEVADA ANNUAL CONFERENCE OF THE UNITED METHODIST CHURCH'S motion to strike Defendants' memorandum of costs in its entirety is denied. Plaintiffs have not set forth sufficient evidence establishing that Defendants waived their statutory right to recover costs. Plaintiffs' motion to tax costs is granted in part and denied in part. Defendants may recover the following costs: (1) Filing and Motion fees in the amount of $280.00; (2) Service of Process Costs in the amount of $388.50; (3) Court Reporter Costs in the amount of $565.00; and (4) Administrative Record Costs in the amount of $5,215.36. All other costs are stricken. Plaintiffs shall pay Defendants costs in the amount of $6,448.86 within 30 days of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H.
